selector.title: Choose a cart
selector.subtitle: Add this product to one of your carts or create a new one instantly.
selector.noCarts: No carts yet. Create your first cart below.
selector.promoHelp: The saved code is applied during the default Shopware checkout promotion flow.
selector.createDisabledLimit: You have reached the maximum of %limit% carts.
selector.cartProductsEmpty: No products in this cart yet.
selector.switchCartError: The selected cart could not be loaded.
selector.createError: The cart could not be created.
selector.addError: The product could not be added to the cart.
selector.removeItemSuccess: The product was removed from the selected cart.
selector.removeItemError: The product could not be removed from the selected cart.

account.title: My carts
account.subtitle: Manage personal, work, or campaign carts from one place and move straight to checkout when you are ready.
account.helper: Create new carts from the add-to-cart popup, then manage preferences and combined payment here.
account.checkoutPrefsDisabled: Combined payment selection is hidden because per-cart checkout preferences are disabled.
account.multiPaymentDisabled: Combined payment is disabled, so each cart must be checked out individually.
account.createFailed: The cart could not be created.
account.createLimitReached: You have reached the maximum of %limit% carts for your account.
account.createUnavailable: Cart creation is currently unavailable for your account.
account.renameHint: Use this field to rename the cart. Save to update the cart name everywhere.
account.renameSuccess: The cart name was updated successfully.
account.renameFailed: The cart name could not be updated.
account.activateFailed: The selected cart could not be activated.
account.checkoutFailed: The selected cart could not be prepared for checkout.
account.duplicateFailed: The cart could not be duplicated.
account.deleteFailed: The cart could not be deleted.
account.customerNotAllowedMessage: Your account is not eligible for multi-cart.
account.blacklistedMessage: Multi-cart is not available for your account.
account.deleteConfirm: Do you really want to delete this cart?
account.promoApplyFailed: The promotion code could not be applied.
account.addressCreateSuccess: The new address was created successfully.
account.addressCreateFailed: The address could not be created. Please complete all required fields.
account.noProducts: No products in this cart yet.
account.empty: You do not have any saved carts yet. Create one from the add-to-cart popup to get started.

combined.disabledMessage: Enable multi-cart payment in the plugin settings to combine multiple carts into one checkout.
combined.title: Combined checkout
combined.description: You are about to pay for the selected carts together.
combined.noSelection: Please select at least one cart for combined payment.
combined.notice: Combined checkout has been prepared with the selected preferences.
